title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 644.124 - State treasurer authorized to invest moneys of fund
text:
644.124.  State treasurer authorized to invest moneys of fund. — The state treasurer is authorized to deposit all of the moneys in the wastewater loan fund in the manner now or hereafter provided in section 30.260.  Any interest received on such deposits shall be credited to the wastewater loan fund.
(L. 1987 H.B. 497, A.L. 1991 S.B. 185) 
Effective 6-18-91
